creator: oleg.ginzburg@nevosoft.ru
text:
Firefox 3.1-Beta3 find out very small of available plug-in in systems. For example, in Edit-Preference->(Main) Manage Add-ons -> (Plugin), FF 3.1Beta found only
"Default Plugin"
and
"Shockwave Flash 10xx"
while
firefox3 or firefox2 show are big (in my system) plugins lists.

How-To-Repeat: For example, with SilverLight plugin:
cd /usr/ports/www/firefox3-devel && make install
cd /usr/ports/multimedia/moonlight && make WITH_XPI_PLUGIN_ONLY=yes install

After complete, and firefox3 startup, SilverLight will be not found with FF3.1
/ Edit-Preference->(Main) Manage Add-ons -> (Plugin) /
